description: TokenJay is an Ergo ecosystem service offering APIs around token verification, pricing, AgeUSD, Babel fee liquidity, peer detection, and ErgoPay-related payment flows. Its public site describes these as open API services for use in dApps and other clients.
summary: TokenJay exposes one public HTTP API at https://api.tokenjay.app/, documented via OpenAPI; no GraphQL, MCP server, CLI, or developer-issued credentials were found.
